Added nova_backend/services/autonomy_repair_planner.py and tools/nova_autonomy_repair_planner_smoke.py. Repair planner identifies failure type, likely cause, files to inspect, smallest safe repair, tests, rollback, and next step.

Added nova_backend/services/autonomy_repair_builder.py and tools/nova_autonomy_repair_builder_smoke.py. Repair builder creates exact manual repair steps, compile checks, smokes, commit commands, rollback commands, and safety rules.

Repair-build command locked at a9f6c9c with API smoke coverage. Memory quality smoke, Project-state recall, Regression runner, Repair Builder service, Repair Builder command, Repair Planner service, and Repair Planner command remain locked.

Added nova_backend/services/autonomy_workflow_catalog.py and tools/nova_autonomy_workflow_catalog_smoke.py. Workflow catalog returns manual_workflow_catalog_only guidance for repair-build, repair-plan, patch-build, autonomy-plan, project-state, commit, and standard safe workflows.

Workflow-catalog command locked at aa46426 with API smoke coverage. Safe Workflow Catalog service and command are locked with memory quality, project-state recall, regression runner, repair-build, repair-plan, patch-build, autonomy-plan, and autonomy task brain.

Added nova_backend/services/autonomy_ladder_index.py and tools/nova_autonomy_ladder_index_smoke.py. Ladder index lists autonomy, autonomy-plan, patch-build, repair-plan, repair-build, workflow-catalog, global safety rules, recommended order, core smokes, and next manual command.

Autonomy-index command locked at 19bbb1e with API smoke coverage. The manual autonomy ladder is now indexed: autonomy, autonomy-plan, patch-build, repair-plan, repair-build, workflow-catalog, and autonomy-index.

Added nova_backend/services/autonomy_command_registry_plan.py and tools/nova_autonomy_command_registry_plan_smoke.py. Registry plan is plan-only and preserves all locked autonomy command behavior without refactoring app.py yet.

Added nova_backend/services/autonomy_command_registry.py and tools/nova_autonomy_command_registry_smoke.py. Registry is read_only_command_registry and keeps all autonomy commands descriptive only with no execution or file-edit behavior.

Command-registry command locked at c6b0786 with API smoke coverage. Read-only registry can list all locked autonomy commands and match command-registry: repair-build without changing existing app.py command guard behavior.

Added nova_backend/services/autonomy_guard_cleanup_review.py and tools/nova_autonomy_guard_cleanup_review_smoke.py. Review found 14 command guard markers and 18 before_request guards, with one warning: patch_proposal_only is not visibly present in app.py.
Repaired autonomy-plan mode visibility in app.py so guard cleanup review can verify patch_proposal_only before any registry adapter migration.

Added nova_backend/services/autonomy_command_registry_adapter.py and tools/nova_command_registry_adapter_smoke.py, then repaired the registry by listing command-registry itself so adapter smoke passes.
